title.rendered: [Free Webinar] 3 Strategies Guaranteed to Boost Fundraising Success in 2025

content.rendered:
Date: Wednesday, February 19, 2025
Time: 1 pm ET / 11 am PT (1 hour)
Cost: Free
Presented by: Robert Friend, Fundraising Specialist at Eventgroove

Nonprofits continue to face rising costs, shifting donor expectations, and rapid technological change, but these challenges are also their greatest opportunities. This free one-hour webinar will deliver three actionable strategies to help streamline your communications, deepen donor connections, and boost fundraising revenue in 2025.

In this webinar, you’ll learn how to:

  1. Use AI and automation to personalize donor outreach and create dynamic content to save time and resources.
  2. Engage donors with innovative strategies like subscription giving, peer-to-peer campaigns, and gamified fundraising.
  3. Simplify your work by centralizing events, campaigns, and communications into a single, streamlined hub.

You’ll also leave with a 3-point fundraising action plan to help you innovate and make a greater impact in 2025!

 Register Now!

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, you will be sent a link to the recording within 24 hours after the webinar is over. Visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.
